nodes.name: Get Printer Status
nodes.notes:
Connects to the printer via local MQTT and requests a full status push.
Configure the 'Bambu Lab Local' credential with your printer IP, serial, and access code.

nodes.name: Extract Key Fields

parameters.jsCode:
const p = $json?.print ?? $json;
const tray = p.vt_tray ?? {};
const online = p.online ?? {};

return {
  state: p.gcode_state ?? 'unknown',
  print_type: p.print_type ?? 'unknown',
  stage: p.mc_print_stage ?? null,
  progress_pct: Number(p.mc_percent ?? 0),
  remaining_min: Number(p.mc_remaining_time ?? 0),
  current_layer: Number(p.layer_num ?? 0),
  total_layers: Number(p.total_layer_num ?? 0),
  task_name: p.subtask_name ?? '',
  project_id: p.project_id ?? '',
  task_id: p.task_id ?? '',
  wifi_signal: p.wifi_signal ?? '',
  nozzle_temp_c: Number(p.nozzle_temper ?? 0),
  nozzle_target_c: Number(p.nozzle_target_temper ?? 0),
  bed_temp_c: Number(p.bed_temper ?? 0),
  bed_target_c: Number(p.bed_target_temper ?? 0),
  chamber_temp_c: Number(p.chamber_temper ?? 0),
  heatbreak_fan_speed: Number(p.heatbreak_fan_speed ?? 0),
  cooling_fan_speed: Number(p.cooling_fan_speed ?? 0),
  aux_fan1_speed: Number(p.big_fan1_speed ?? 0),
  aux_fan2_speed: Number(p.big_fan2_speed ?? 0),
  speed_level: Number(p.spd_lvl ?? 0),
  speed_percent: Number(p.spd_mag ?? 0),
  error_code: Number(p.print_error ?? 0),
  chamber_light: Array.isArray(p.lights_report) ? p.lights_report.find((light) => light.node === 'chamber_light')?.mode ?? '' : '',
  ams_status: Number(p.ams_status ?? 0),
  active_tray_id: tray.id ?? '',
  tray_type: tray.tray_type ?? '',
  tray_material: tray.tray_info_idx ?? '',
  tray_color: tray.tray_color ?? '',
  tray_k: tray.k ?? null,
  printer_online: Boolean(online.version || online.ahb || online.rfid),
  raw_payload: $json,
};

nodes.notes:
Flattens the raw MQTT payload into a clean summary object.
Edit this node to pull out whatever fields you need.

nodes.name: Send Raw Command
nodes.notes:
Example: pause a running print.
Disabled by default — enable and connect to the trigger above to test.
Other commands: 'resume', 'stop'. See Bambu MQTT docs for full command list.
